heading: Collection of service charges for certification or validation of information assurance products
label: 3618 Collection of service charges for certification or validation of information assurance products
notes: CodificationSection was formerly classified in a note under prior to editorial reclassification as this section.section 402 of this title

children.heading: Collection
children.label: a Collection
children.text: The Director may collect charges for evaluating, certifying, or validating information assurance products under the National Information Assurance Program or successor program.

children.heading: Establishment of charges
children.label: b Establishment of charges
children.text: The charges collected under subsection (a) shall be established through a public rulemaking process in accordance with Office of Management and Budget Circular No. A–25.

children.heading: Limitation on charges
children.label: c Limitation on charges
children.text: Charges collected under subsection (a) shall not exceed the direct costs of the program referred to in that subsection.

children.heading: Reimbursement or advance payment
children.label: d Reimbursement or advance payment
children.text: The appropriation or fund bearing the cost of the service for which charges are collected under the program referred to in subsection (a) may be reimbursed, or the Director may require advance payment subject to such adjustment on completion of the work as may be agreed upon.

children.heading: Crediting of amounts collected
children.label: e Crediting of amounts collected
children.text: Amounts collected under this section shall be credited to the account or accounts from which costs associated with such amounts have been or will be incurred, to reimburse or offset the direct costs of the program referred to in subsection (a).
